description: ShipLoop lifecycle hooks — auto-detect project state on session start

hooks.command: if [ -d .shiploop ]; then echo 'ShipLoop detected. Run /sl-status to see current state.'; elif [ -f .claude-plugin/plugin.json ] && grep -q shiploop .claude-plugin/plugin.json 2>/dev/null; then echo 'ShipLoop plugin repo detected.'; fi

if [ -f .shiploop/state.json ]; then PHASE=$(python3 -c "import json; print(json.load(open('.shiploop/state.json'))['phase'])" 2>/dev/null || echo 'unknown'); if [ "$PHASE" != 'idle' ] && [ "$PHASE" != 'unknown' ]; then echo "WARNING: ShipLoop is mid-loop (phase: $PHASE). Consider running /sl-handoff before compacting."; fi; fi
